title: Intersection of Two Arrays
description:
Given two integer arrays `nums1` and `nums2`, return an array of their
**intersection**. Each element in the result must be **unique**. Return the
result sorted in ascending order.

solutions.summary: Put one array in a set, collect matches from the other, then sort.

steps.title: Build a set of the first array
steps.explanation: Membership tests against a set are O(1), which makes the lookups cheap.

steps.title: Collect shared values uniquely
steps.explanation: Scan the second array; keep each value that is in `first`, using another set to avoid duplicates.

steps.title: Return the result sorted
steps.explanation: Turn the set into a list and sort it ascending.
